metadata.title:
SAYS He.


WAS FORCED
To Do It

pages.raw_text:
In a statement delivered by the
wife of Steve Adams to ex-Gov-
ernor Morrison, one of Adams at
torneys, Adams claims that he was
threatened by Governor Cooling
with hanging If he did not corro-
borate Orchards confes sion impli-
eating the Western Federation of
Miners in the Stuenenberg killing.
Adams is now somewhere in the
Idaho mountains in custody of
sheriff, it is claimed, who is dodg-
Ing writs of haibeas corpus in order
to deliver Adams to Colorado,
where he is wanted on charge of
murder.


In his statement Adams says:


"The statement | signed was
made to James MCFARLAND, detec-
tive, and Harry Ochard, alias Tom
Hogan. signed it because l was
threatened by Governor Goodfng,
saying | would be hung if l did not
corroborate Orchards story against
the officers of the Western Fedora
ton of Miners. They also promised
to clear me if | followed instruc-
tons"


Mrs. Adams corroborated much
